fr:frontmatter.fr:title: The topos of labelled trees: a categorical semantics for SCCS
fr:frontmatter.fr:meta: @article{kasangian-vigna-1997, author = {Kasangian, Stefano and Vigna, Sebastiano}, location = {NLD}, publisher = {IOS Press}, date = {1997-01}, issn = {0169-2968}, journaltitle = {Fundam. Inf.}, keywords = {topos theory,semantics,category theory,process algebras}, number = {1}, pages = {27--45}, title = {The Topos of Labelled Trees: A Categorical Semantics for SCCS}, volume = {32}, }
